segments.text: He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High will abide in the shadow of the Almighty.
I will say to the LORD, 'My refuge and my fortress, my God, in whom I trust.'
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For he will deliver you from the snare of the fowler and from the deadly pestilence.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He will cover you with his pinions, and under his wings you will find refuge; his faithfulness is a shield and buckler.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will not fear the terror of the night, nor the arrow that flies by day,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: nor the pestilence that stalks in darkness, nor the destruction that wastes at noonday.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: A thousand may fall at your side, ten thousand at your right hand, but it will not come near you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will only look with your eyes and see the recompense of the wicked.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Because you have made the LORD your dwelling place— the Most High, who is my refuge—
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: no evil shall be allowed to befall you, no plague come near your tent.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For he will command his angels concerning you to guard you in all your ways.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On their hands they will bear you up, lest you strike your foot against a stone.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will tread on the lion and the adder; the young lion and the serpent you will trample underfoot.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: 'Because he holds fast to me in love, I will deliver him; I will protect him, because he knows my name.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: 'When he calls to me, I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble; I will rescue him and honor him.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: 'With long life I will satisfy him and show him my salvation.'
segments.speaker: God
